Question
========
Which of the following statements about assignment operators in R are TRUE?

Answerlist
----------
* Both `<-` and `=` can be used as assignment operators
* The arrow `<-` can be reversed to assign values (e.g., `10 -> z`)
* There is absolutely no difference between `<-` and `=` in all contexts
* RStudio and Positron have a keyboard shortcut (Alt + minus) for typing `<-`
* Using `=` requires fewer keystrokes than using `<-`

Solution
========


Meta-information
================
exname: assignment_operators
extype: mchoice
exsolution: 11011
exshuffle: TRUE
